taskDescription: Complete the crossword on Integration of Metabolism and Biological Oxidation

words.clue: Two-carbon metabolic hub produced by pyruvate dehydrogenase and beta-oxidation (two words, no hyphen)
Hormone of the fasting state that promotes glycogenolysis and gluconeogenesis
Storage form of glucose in liver and muscle
Cycle that oxidises Acetyl-CoA in the mitochondrial matrix (abbreviation)
Life-threatening metabolic emergency caused by insulin deficiency with ketone body accumulation (abbreviation)
Process of generating glucose from non-carbohydrate precursors in the liver
Complex I inhibitor that is the most prescribed diabetes drug worldwide
Poison that blocks Complex IV of the electron transport chain
Ratio that describes moles of ATP produced per atom of oxygen consumed
Protein complex that uses the proton gradient to synthesise ATP (two words)

overallFeedback.feedback: Review the electron transport chain complexes and metabolic hub connections.
Good work! Brush up on clinical correlates of ETC inhibition.
Excellent! You understand metabolic integration and biological oxidation well.
